codeReview.summary: The fix feature successfully adds comprehensive unit tests for Either-based validation functions and API response parsing in schema.ts. All 8 blocking issues from the original failure are now addressed with 48 test cases covering validateEither, validateEitherDetailed, createEitherValidator, validateAndTransform, validateAsync, parseApiResponse, parsePaginatedResponse, and parseApiError. All tests pass (221 total).

summary: PASS - The fix feature adequately addresses all 8 blocking issues from the original failure. Tests verify Either return types for: validateEither (6 tests), validateEitherDetailed (3 tests), createEitherValidator (3 tests), validateAndTransform (4 tests), validateAsync (4 tests), parseApiResponse (3 tests), parsePaginatedResponse (5 tests), and parseApiError (5 tests). Additionally added tests for safeParse, validateRequired, validateOptional, UserSchema, and ApiErrorSchema. All 221 tests pass.
